description: Per-query steady-state allocation budget per role (PERF-008, task #508). Values are bytes per query measured over 100,000 iterations under dhat-rs. These are initial budgets; tighten as the implementation matures.

authoritative.note: PENDING — capture with scripts/bench/profile-alloc.sh --role authoritative. Target: <512 bytes/query for plain DNS.

recursive.note: PENDING — capture with scripts/bench/profile-alloc.sh --role recursive. Target: <2048 bytes/query (recursive lookup chain).

forwarder.note: PENDING — capture with scripts/bench/profile-alloc.sh --role forwarder. Target: <512 bytes/query.
